foundational_skills.name: Foundational MI Skills
foundational_skills.description: Core motivational interviewing skills that apply universally across customer and colleague contexts. Start here for new learners.

modules.title: Collaborative Climate - Partnership & Autonomy
modules.focus: Establishing partnership, honoring autonomy, collaborative approach

modules.title: Simple Reflections - Core Skill Practice
modules.focus: Basic reflective listening, capturing what was said

modules.title: Open-Ended Questions - Building Rapport
modules.focus: Asking questions that invite exploration rather than yes/no

modules.title: Affirmations - Recognizing Strengths
modules.focus: Noticing and acknowledging strengths, effort, and positive qualities

modules.title: Complex & Double-Sided Reflections - Exploring Ambivalence
modules.focus: Adding meaning, emotion, and capturing both sides of ambivalence

modules.title: Summarizing - Linking and Transitioning
modules.focus: Pulling together key points, linking themes, smooth transitions

modules.title: Confidence Scaling - Assessment Practice
modules.focus: Using scales to assess readiness and explore what increases/decreases confidence

modules.title: Recognizing & Evoking Change Talk
modules.focus: Recognizing different types of change talk and using reflections to evoke more

learning_outcomes: Establish collaborative partnerships with customers and colleagues
Use reflective listening to demonstrate understanding
Ask open-ended questions that invite exploration
Recognize and affirm strengths and effort
Navigate ambivalence without taking sides
Summarize key points and link themes together
Assess readiness using confidence scaling
Recognize and evoke change talk

intermediate_skills.name: Intermediate MI Applications
intermediate_skills.description: Intermediate skills for facilitating decision-making and supporting autonomous choices. Builds on foundational skills.

modules.title: Decisional Balance - Exploring Pros and Cons
modules.focus: Exploring both sides of ambivalence systematically

modules.title: Elicit-Provide-Elicit - Information Exchange
modules.focus: Sharing information collaboratively with permission

modules.title: Planning - Developing Change Plans
modules.focus: Supporting people to develop their own change plans

modules.title: Anticipatory Coping - Preparing for Challenges
modules.focus: Helping people anticipate obstacles and develop coping strategies

modules.title: Collaborative Climate - Reinforcement
modules.focus: Reinforcing partnership and autonomy throughout interactions

learning_outcomes: Facilitate decisional balance exercises
Share information using Elicit-Provide-Elicit
Support autonomous change planning
Help people anticipate and prepare for challenges
Maintain collaborative climate throughout all interactions

customer_facing_tier1.name: Customer-Facing: Tier 1 Initial Engagement
customer_facing_tier1.description: Skills for initial customer interactions, building rapport, and understanding customer needs. Focus on Domains 1, 2, and 5.

modules.title: Debt Advice: Initial Engagement
modules.focus: Domain 2 - Building rapport with customers seeking debt advice, reducing shame

modules.title: Supporting Financial Anxiety
modules.focus: Domain 1 - Supporting anxious customers with empathy and validation

modules.title: Savings Goal Setting
modules.focus: Domain 5 - Facilitating savings goal exploration using evoking

modules.title: Budget Planning with Impartial Guidance
modules.focus: Domain 5 - Facilitative coaching approach to budget discussions

learning_outcomes: Build rapport with customers seeking debt advice
Support customers experiencing financial anxiety
Facilitate savings goal exploration
Guide budget discussions using impartial facilitation
Apply MI skills across Domains 1, 2, and 5

customer_facing_tier2.name: Customer-Facing: Tier 2 Complex Guidance
customer_facing_tier2.description: Skills for complex customer scenarios including pensions and longer-term planning. Focus on Domain 11.

modules.title: Pensions Exploration: Future Planning Discussion
modules.focus: Domain 11 - Facilitating pensions exploration with impartial guidance

modules.title: Decisional Balance for Complex Decisions
modules.focus: Applying decisional balance to complex financial decisions

learning_outcomes: Facilitate pensions exploration conversations
Apply impartial guidance to complex financial topics
Use decisional balance for complex decisions
Support customer decision-making in Domain 11

colleague_facing_foundation.name: Colleague-Facing: Foundation Skills
colleague_facing_foundation.description: Core skills for internal coaching and development conversations with colleagues.

modules.title: Career Development: Coaching Conversation
modules.focus: Facilitative coaching approach to career development discussions

modules.title: Performance Review: Reflective Practice
modules.focus: Using reflective approach in performance discussions

modules.title: Skill Gap Coaching: Development Support
modules.focus: Coaching conversations about skill gaps while maintaining dignity

learning_outcomes: Facilitate career development conversations
Use reflective approaches in performance reviews
Coach colleagues on skill gaps while maintaining dignity
Apply MI skills to internal workplace contexts

colleague_facing_advanced.name: Colleague-Facing: Team Dynamics
colleague_facing_advanced.description: Advanced skills for facilitating team dynamics and mediation.

modules.title: Team Dynamics: Mediation and Facilitation
modules.focus: Facilitating team dynamics discussions while maintaining neutrality

learning_outcomes: Facilitate team dynamics discussions
Maintain neutrality in conflict situations
Use MI skills for team mediation
Apply advanced MI to complex workplace dynamics

assessment_and_feedback.name: Assessment and Feedback Practice
assessment_and_feedback.description: Practice modules focusing on assessment skills and providing effective feedback on MI practice.

modules.title: Confidence Scaling Assessment Practice
modules.focus: Using scales to assess practitioner confidence and skill development

modules.title: Recognizing Change Talk in Practice
modules.focus: Assessing ability to recognize and evoke change talk

modules.title: Anticipating Challenges in Practice
modules.focus: Helping practitioners anticipate and prepare for practice challenges

learning_outcomes: Use scaling for assessment purposes
Recognize and assess change talk in practice
Support practitioners in anticipating practice challenges
Provide effective feedback on MI skills

shared-decisional-balance-009.title: Decisional Balance - Exploring Pros and Cons
